title: Otis Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.34 per Share
text: FARMINGTON, Conn. , Oct. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share of Otis' common stock.

title: Otis (OTIS) Q3 Earnings Beat, Modernization Orders Up 13%
text: Solid operational improvement, a lower share count and an effective tax rate improvement boost Otis' (OTIS) Q3 earnings.

title: Compared to Estimates, Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Otis Worldwide (OTIS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.95 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.87 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.80 per share a year ago.

title: OTIS REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: Delivers organic sales and margin growth. Achieves high-teens adjusted EPS growth driven by continued Service momentum.

title: Tom Bartlett and Jill Brannon Appointed to Otis Worldwide Corporation Board of Directors
text: McGraw to Depart Otis Worldwide Corporation Board FARMINGTON, Conn. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS), the world's leading company for elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation and service, announced today that Tom Bartlett and Jill Brannon have been appointed to its Board of Directors, effective October 27, 2023.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) third-quarter 2023 results are likely to benefit from higher volume, favorable pricing and productivity.

title: Otis Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Advisory
text: FARMINGTON, Conn. , Oct. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) will host a conference call on Wednesday, October 25, 2023, at 8:30 a.m.

title: Otis Worldwide: Strong Service And Pricing Growth Offset Order Weakness
text: OTIS Worldwide Corporation is a global leader in the elevator and escalator industry, operating in over 200 countries. The company showcased strong organic growth in new equipment sales, but NE orders decreased compared to the previous year. Despite mixed signals, management remains optimistic about growth in 2023 and expects an uptick in revenue compared to the prior year.

title: Otis Earns EcoVadis Gold Sustainability Rating for Second Consecutive Year
text: FARMINGTON, Conn. , Oct. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) earned a gold rating this year from EcoVadis, a global sustainability rating platform.
